value.found_quote: We added support for environment variables and improved how memory carries through a session.
value.rationale: The claim is that Google offers Jules memory. The page describes Jules as Google's autonomous coding agent and explicitly mentions a memory feature: "We added support for environment variables and improved how memory carries through a session." This substantiates that Jules has memory capabilities. Note the page does not mention "Project Jitro," "Jules V2," or a "persistent agentic workspace with goals, insights, and history" — those framing details from the claim are not present — but the core offering (Jules with session memory) is described, and it is presented as a shipped, available improvement.
